'''The Great Zorbak''' was a [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] gymnast that performed acrobatics in a [[Unidentified hologram circus/Legends|circus]] on [[Lumpawaroo/Legends|Lumpawaroo's]] holographic table. She was introduced by the [[Holographic Ringmaster|Ring-Master]].<ref name="hs">''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]''</ref>

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Great Zorbak was originally referred to by name by the Ring-Master, but this line was cut from the film and replaced with electronic music.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]''
